name: DeepLabCut Pose Estimation

params.name: Zipped Model Folder
params.description: DeepLabCut model folder compressed in a .ZIP file. The contents of this file will be extracted and used for execution with DeepLabCut

params.name: Behavior Movie
params.description: Behavioural movies to analyze. Must be one of the following formats: .isxb, .mp4, and .avi.

params.name: Experiment Annotations Format
params.description: The file format of the output experiment annotations file. Can be either .parquet or .csv

params.name: Crop Rectangle
params.description: Draw a cropping rectangle on the input movie which will be used by DeepLabCut to crop movie frames before running the model.

params.name: Window Length
params.description: Length of the median filter applied on the predictions. Must be an odd number. If zero, then no filtering is applied.

params.name: Displayed Body Parts
params.description: Selects the body parts that are plotted in the video. The body parts are specified in the config.yaml file of the zipped model folder.

params.name: P Cutoff
params.description: Cutoff threshold for predictions when labelling the input movie. If predictions are below the threshold, then they are not displayed.

params.name: Dot Size
params.description: Size in pixels to draw a point labelling a body part.

params.name: Color Map
params.description: Color map used to color body part labels. Any matplotlib colormap name is acceptable.

params.name: Keypoints Only
params.description: Only display keypoints, not video frames.

params.name: Output Frame Rate
params.description: Positive number, output frame rate for labeled video. If None, use the input movie frame rate.

params.name: Draw Skeleton
params.description: If True adds a line connecting the body parts, making a skeleton on each frame. The body parts to be connected and the color of these connecting lines are specified by the Color Map.

params.name: Trail Points
params.description: Number of previous frames whose body parts are plotted in a frame (for displaying history).

results.name: DeepLabCut Annotations
results.description: DeepLabCut pose estimates in IDEAS experiment annotations format

results.name: DeepLabCut Labeled Movie
results.description: DeepLabCut pose estimates annotated on the input movie

results.name: DeepLabCut Pose Estimates
results.description: DeepLabCut pose estimates in an H5 file

description: Track animal body parts with a user-uploaded, pre-trained model
